title: Security
description: This directory contains classes related to security in Hadoop MapReduce. It includes classes for transferring secrets from the job client to the tasks, obtaining delegation tokens from namenodes, and removing jobtoken referrals that don't make sense in the context of the task execution. The classes in this directory collaborate to ensure secure execution of MapReduce jobs.

raw_response:
TITLE: Security

DESCRIPTION:
This directory contains classes related to security in Hadoop MapReduce. It includes classes for transferring secrets from the job client to the tasks, obtaining delegation tokens from namenodes, and removing jobtoken referrals that don't make sense in the context of the task execution. The classes in this directory collaborate to ensure secure execution of MapReduce jobs.
